input.command:
# Only 20 tokens with defaultList:true. Let's try without defaultList
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[8453],"limit":100}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Total without defaultList: {len(d)}')
for c in d[:5]:
    print(c.get('symbol'), c.get('address')[:30])
"
input.description: Test Relay currencies without defaultList filter
